analysis:
【今日摘要】

今日市場情緒波動，受美伊軍事衝突和石油價格波動影響。美伊雙方同意暫停攻擊，石油價格微幅上漲。特斯拉的交付數字將在短時間內公佈，市場關注其影響。OpenAI可能會延遲其首次公開募股（IPO），影響人工智慧股市。Micron因為大型科技公司為人工智慧記憶體元件支付天價而財務大轉折。

【結語】

投資者務必謹慎評估風險，避免過度膨脹恐慌情緒。市場波動是投資的機會，但需要謹慎評估風險。投資者應該優先考慮基本面，選擇具有良好基本面的公司進行投資。同時，投資者也應該保持警惕，隨時監測市場情緒和風險。

【精選個股】

NVDA - NVIDIA - NVIDIA 因為其人工智慧基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，成為市場關注的焦點。
MU - Micron Technology - Micron 因為大型科技公司為人工智慧記憶體元件支付天價而財務大轉折，成為市場關注的焦點。
TSLA - 特斯拉 - 特斯拉的交付數字將在短時間內公佈，市場關注其影響。

風險提醒：投資者應該謹慎評估風險，避免過度膨脹恐慌情緒。

items.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise On U.S.-Iran News; Market At Tipping Point
items.summary: The U.S. and Iran reportedly have agreed to halt tit-for-tat attacks. Tesla sales and the June jobs report on are on tap.
items.zh_title: 道瓊未來指數上漲 美伊新聞引發市場關注
items.zh_point: 美國和伊朗據報已同意暫停報復性攻擊，道瓊未來指數因此上漲。另外，特斯拉的銷售數據和六月就業報告即將公佈，市場正處於關鍵時刻。

items.title: SpaceX Made a Huge Pivot in Its Business, but the Market Hasn't Caught on Yet
items.summary: SpaceX is headed for some huge revenue growth over the next year.
items.zh_title: SpaceX 做出重大轉變，但市場還未察覺
items.zh_point: SpaceX 預期明年將出現龐大的收入增長，但市場迄今尚未對此做出反應。

items.title: OpenAI Reportedly Considers Delaying Its IPO. Should You Worry About AI Stocks?
items.summary: Investors were expecting OpenAI to launch an IPO this year.
items.zh_title: OpenAI reportedly considers delaying its IPO. Should you worry about AI stocks?
items.zh_point: 投資者原本預期OpenAI今年將發行首次公開募股（IPO），但公司可能會延遲此計畫。這是否會影響人工智慧股市？

items.title: Tesla Reports Q2 Deliveries in a Matter of Days. Here's the Number That Matters.
items.summary: One number due in the first few days of July matters more than any robotaxi update right now.
items.zh_title: 特斯拉Q2交付數字將在短短幾天內公佈。這個數字比任何自駕汽車更新更重要。
items.zh_point: 特斯拉即將公佈第二季度交付數字，這將是近期最關注的財經指標。

items.title: 3 Artificial Intelligence Stocks You Can Buy and Hold for the Next Decade
items.summary: Growth investors are prioritizing AI stocks for market-beating returns, and it's no wonder why that's the case.
items.zh_title: 未來十年你可以持有這三大人工智慧股票
items.zh_point: 人工智慧股為投資人帶來市場超越的回報，投資人為什麼會這樣做？

items.title: Oil jumps back above $70 as fresh U.S.-Iran clashes reignite Middle East supply fears
items.summary: Oil edged higher on Monday after renewed military strikes between the U.S. and Iran reignited concerns over crude supplies from the Middle East.
items.zh_title: 石油價格再次突破 70 美元 美伊最新軍事衝突重燃中東供應恐懼
items.zh_point: 石油價格周一升高，美國與伊朗最新的軍事衝突再次引發對中東原油供應的擔憂。

items.title: Stock futures edge higher, Asia mixed as renewed U.S.-Iran attacks push oil prices up: Live updates
items.summary: Wall Street is coming off a mixed week, characterized by a rotation out of tech and into other parts of the stock market.
items.zh_title: 美股未來股指微升，亞洲股市兩極化　美伊戰事再起推油價上升：即時更新
items.zh_point: 美股周五呈現出來回波動，科技股轉趨下跌，投資人轉向其他股市領域。

items.title: Iran talks on hold after fighting breaks out and Trump once again threatens annihilation
items.summary: Iran says it targeted U.S. military facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain following U.S. strikes on targets in and around the Strait of Hormuz.
items.zh_title: 伊朗會談暫停 美軍基地在科威特和巴林遭伊朗攻擊
items.zh_point: 伊朗表示針對美國軍事設施在科威特和巴林進行攻擊，作為對美國在霍爾木茲海峽周圍和附近目標進行打擊的回應。這一行動出現於伊朗與美國談判暫停之際，特朗普再次威脅伊朗將會遭到毀滅。

items.title: Venezuela quake death toll reaches 1,450 as rescue work goes on
items.summary: Just under 50,000 people were listed as unaccounted for on a website promoted by the country's political opposition on Sunday.
items.zh_title: 委內瑞拉地震死亡人數達1,450名，救援工作仍在進行中
items.zh_point: 委內瑞拉地震造成大量傷亡，目前已知死亡人數達1,450名，仍有逾5萬人失蹤。

items.title: Everything tied to the data center is suddenly suspect. Can Big Tech fix it?
items.summary: The hyperscalers are just beginning to figure out the consequences of the AI arms race, and now everyone seems to be against them.
items.zh_title: 超級雲端中心的每件事都突然變得可疑。巨型科技公司能夠修復嗎？
items.zh_point: 超級雲端中心公司正開始意識到人工智慧競賽的後果，現在似乎所有人都在反對他們。

items.title: Oil prices, stock futures inch higher as U.S. and Iran reportedly agree to halt attacks
items.summary: Oil prices rose Sunday while U.S. stock-index futures advanced, after the U.S. and Iran reportedly agreed to halt attacks after repeatedly exchanging fire in the Persian Gulf over the weekend.
items.zh_title: 石油價格和美股未來價格微幅上漲 美伊雙方據報同意暫停攻擊
items.zh_point: 美伊雙方在週末多次交火後，據報同意暫停攻擊，石油價格和美股未來價格因此微幅上漲。

items.title: I had gallbladder surgery. After I got home, the hospital asked me for a financial donation. Is this ethical?
items.summary: “The letter asked whether I had a favorite caregiver and if I would like to make a contribution in their honor.”
items.zh_title: 我進行了膽囊手術，回家後醫院要求我捐款，是否合理？
items.zh_point: 一名病人在回家後收到醫院的捐款請求，引發關於醫療機構的行為是否合理的爭議。

items.title: Your health insurer shouldn’t decide your treatment plan. That’s what your doctor — and AI — should be doing.
items.summary: With a digital health record, clinicians and AI-driven diagnostic tools would be able to see your full health history, and then make better decisions.
items.zh_title: 你的保險公司不應該決定你的治療計畫。讓你的醫生——和AI——來做這件事。
items.zh_point: 透過數位健康記錄，醫生和AI驅動的診斷工具可以看到你的完整健康歷史，從而做出更好的決策。

items.title: ‘It feels like a medical miracle’: How did a single QR code coupon cut my $618 Walgreens prescription to $15?
items.summary: “This medication was generic.”
items.zh_title: 一張QR碼折扣券讓我從$618的藥品費用降至$15
items.zh_point: 一位病人透露，他的藥費從原本的618美元降至15美元，僅憑一張QR碼折扣券，讓他感到像經歷了一個醫療奇蹟。

items.title: Micron is about to be more profitable than any U.S. company except Nvidia and Google
items.summary: Big Tech companies are willing to pay astronomical prices for AI memory components, helping spark a dramatic turnaround in Micron’s finances.
items.zh_title: Micron 即將超越美國除Nvidia和Google外的所有公司利潤
items.zh_point: Micron 因為大型科技公司為人工智慧記憶體元件支付天價而財務大轉折。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大跌　AI產業受中國DeepSeek影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下跌，納斯達克指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，多家公司股價跌幅超過10%，Nvidia股價跌幅達16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: Comex黃金、白銀結束下跌
items.zh_point: Comex黃金和白銀在最近的交易中出現下跌，黃金下跌1.4%，白銀下跌2.5%，這是黃金連續下跌兩個交易日，白銀連續下跌三個交易日。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國深度探索的AI：深Seek
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，且不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋找不會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒可能過度膨脹。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與通信業新聞彙整：市場話題
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和通信業的最新發展，包括市場分析和投資趨勢。

items.title: Strategy: Is The Preferreds Dip A Buy The Chaos Opportunity?
items.zh_title: 策略：優先股跌幅買入是混亂的機會嗎？
items.zh_point: 優先股市場出現波動，投資者應該趁機買入嗎？分析指出，這可能是投資的機會，但需要謹慎評估風險。

items.title: BlackRock Credit Relative Value Q1 2026 Commentary
items.zh_title: 黑石投資信託信用相對價值 Q1 2026 年評論
items.zh_point: 黑石投資信託在 Q1 2026 年的評論中，可能會針對市場趨勢、投資策略和投資績效進行分析和評估。

items.title: CME Group's Pullback Does Not Change The Rating
items.zh_title: CME集團的回落並未改變評級
items.zh_point: CME集團股價下跌，評級機構認為這並不影響對該公司的評級。

items.title: Gabelli Closed End Funds: Insights From Growth Portfolio Managers
items.zh_title: 加伯利封閉式基金：成長投資組合經理的見解
items.zh_point: 加伯利封閉式基金的投資組合經理分享了他們對投資市場的見解和經驗，提供投資者參考。

items.title: Farmland Partners: Still Not Attractive After The Decline
items.zh_title: 農田夥伴：仍未吸引人氣
items.zh_point: 農田夥伴公司股價下跌後仍未恢復吸引力，投資者對其未來前景存疑。

items.title: Samsung, SK Hynix to unveil $1.3 trln investment plan in S.Korea, report says
items.zh_title: 三星、SK Hynix將公布1.3萬億韓元投資計畫
items.zh_point: 三星和SK Hynix即將在韓國公布一項超過1.3萬億韓元的投資計畫，可能涉及半導體產業的發展。

items.title: Iran and US agree to halt attacks and renew talks, U.S. official says
items.zh_title: 伊朗和美國同意暫停攻擊並重啟談判，美國官員表示
items.zh_point: 伊朗和美國達成共識，暫停雙方的攻擊行動，並將重啟談判，試圖解決兩國之間的緊張關係。

items.title: Tesla deliveries seen topping consensus as Europe, China sales improve - MS
items.zh_title: 特斯拉交付量料將超越市場預期，歐洲和中國銷售改善 - MS
items.zh_point: 特斯拉的交付量可能會超越市場預期，主要是由於歐洲和中國的銷售改善，市場預期特斯拉的交付量會在今年下半年有所增長，但實際數字可能會超過預期。

items.title: South Korean President to unveil massive AI and chip investment drive
items.zh_title: 韓國總統將推出大規模人工智慧和晶片投資計畫
items.zh_point: 韓國總統將推出一項大規模的人工智慧和晶片投資計畫，以加強該國在這兩個領域的競爭力。

items.title: Chinese brokerages push for LME membership to expand global metals role
items.zh_title: 中國券商爭取倫敦金屬交易所會員資格擴大全球金屬角色
items.zh_point: 中國券商正努力爭取倫敦金屬交易所的會員資格，以擴大其在全球金屬市場的影響力。這一發展可能會對全球金屬市場產生重大影響，讓中國券商能夠更好地參與全球金屬交易和投資。
